title: ...I miss you.
body:
4:01 AM... feeling better after a couple of drinks last night. We’ll see how I feel later in the morning once clarity hits. I’m going to focus on eating, the gym, and studying today.

I know it's too early for something new... but I feel like writing this gets it off my chest. Ties were cut with Lyn-z at some point last night or early this morning, part of me just wishes I could have seen her last few messages before it all went south, I think I just wanted more closure.

I'm sure I went about it the worst way possible and genuinely regret that, but I feel like I just had so much to say and such little time to say it, eventually it all just kinda’ came out at once and wasn’t structured the way I imagined it in my head.

Despite this, I ~~feel like~~ know I’ll still always be there for her. I’m still very proud of who she became and what she will still become. I wish I could support her the way she wanted to be supported. I’m glad she got me into Softcult, among other things… maybe I’ll head out to catch one of their shows this September, with some family in Texas and my current self-improvement goal of getting out there more, I think it’s fate tossing me an offer I can’t set down lightly.

Earbuds in. Early morning air. Softcult on repeat. I'm going for a walk.

...my head might still be spinning, but I know when to offer a sincere apology. I'll always be floating around, you know where to find me. ♥

title: Rabbit Hole
body:
Finally a day where nothing overly eventful happened... exhausted... but glad things are calming down. Jumped back into a bit of VRChat last night and ended up spending nearly 2 hours playing Cards Against Humanity with complete strangers, and it was a blast... pushed me to invest in an actual VR headset to start the rabbit hole, Meta Quest S3. We'll see how it goes and if it pushes me into another expensive rabbit hole hobby... it'll be nice to mess around with and finally play Half-Life: Alyx at the very least.

Good conversations and pump at the gym today. Maybe it's placebo, but I've really been working on eating more and I'm seeing a few small changes here and there... unless my lack of self preservation is pushing me to the limits.

Really big into "idgaf" by fauxx again.

title: Overstimulation
body:
Listening to a lot of DARKNET lately, and I really dig and vibe with their anti-social-media, anti-drug messaging while poking fun at concepts like modern day society having hilariously short attention spans. Modern life is so surrounded in overstimulation and being hollowed out.

I'm also starting to like ditching my phone lately, or throwing it into Zen Mode where I can't really use it until Zen Mode is over. The disconnect has always been important for me and something that seems to really annoy others. It's weird when people can't comprehend putting your phone away for hours at a time to just vibe with life.

Had another solid gym day, getting a lot better at a 225lb squat. Lee really helped push me for more reps and helped with form and everything. I probably have a higher PR in me, but I'm not willing to ego-lift myself to death yet. Still struggling with eating more though. I'll get it down at some point, but eating more is so expensive.

Lots of good little messages between friends today, even though some can feel really disconnected from time to time. Probably one of the biggest reasons I'm so anti-narcotic.

Scars are mostly healed. Bad vices never die, I suppose. I'm too old for this kind of behavior. -_-

title: Clearing Clouds
body:
Today started off a bit somber, slower paced, even a bit sad. Followed by an insane session at the gym, and I feel like I'm starting to feel like myself again. I'm grateful to people at the gym that help me see perspectives otherwise clouded by the fact that I overthink e v e r y t h i n g. I feel like the clouds in my brain are slowly clearing as I drop back to reality and realize what I want in life.

Now it's time to force myself to eat more chicken and rice to stabilize that caloric intake. Today made me feel stronger both physically and mentally.

Song I love right now: "idgaf" by DARKNET. The whole thing has that blunt little mental reset energy, especially the "I pledge not to care" part.

I also finally took the plunge and came across an artist I like that had an open slot for a headshot commission, @Fanayaart. It was a bit pricey all things considered, but I need to start supporting real artists and getting real art done of my character. AI is useful for creating and bringing an idea to life in the moment, but I think I've started to crave actual art the way I've always craved real music. In a world where everyone can create their own music, art, and movies using AI, there's an even stronger need and desire for real artists.

title: Showing Up For Future Me
body:
Today had a few small but memorable moments. The morning started with a really good drive into work, cruising most of the way next to a girl in a white STi that sounded great. It reminded me how much I still want to upgrade to an STi someday. The EJ sound just has such a distinct character, and it made the commute feel more enjoyable than usual.

Music-wise, I was really into "No Love" by Darknet and Enkojin. It had the right kind of hazy, heavy mood and stuck with me for a while.

I also started thinking more seriously about a personal challenge for next month: picking one part of myself that needs improvement and spending the next few months working on it. First focus is being more outgoing, which means going to more raves, concerts, and events solo, even when it feels uncomfortable. I want to build experiences that future me will be glad I actually showed up for.

The gym was a highlight too. I had a pretty solid session, set a lot of personal records, and felt noticeably stronger. It feels like eating more food is starting to pay off, and the extra calories are actually turning into better performance.

Later, I tried to make time to play games with Lyn-z. Spending time with her still feels valuable and cozy, but the server she plays on just is not for me. I tried to give it another shot, but could not really get into it. One of those situations where I value the person, but the activity itself is hard to force.

Overall, today felt busy but meaningful. Good commute, strong gym session, a song that matched the mood, and some clearer thoughts about the kind of person I want to become.



.......do you ever feel like the world is stacking shit against you all at once at the worst time? Falling in love, rough news, family getting older, people you knew just not acting like themselves? Yeah, me either. Grateful to wonderful co-workers and the usuals at the gym. They keep my day going when life takes a turn. ♥

title: Pill To Swallow
body: Lyn-z got me into Softcult, kinda. I've been listening to "Pill To Swallow" over and over again, currently at 49 scrobbles and rising over the past couple of days. Also listenmaxxing "what u want" by vai5000 because it's insane. This is going to be my most listened to track during Spotify Wrapped, I can promise it. Running on four hours of sleep, a Rockstar Hardcore Green Apple, and a pretty crazy workday with a lot of cool people. Started recording another course with Salim too, who seems like a pretty cool dude. Also decided to start a journal on my website and begin filling it up. Hopefully I can keep it somewhat daily, but I'm also adding a few notable things to the backlog. Not totally sure how far back I'll go yet. Also got three new shirts from Nomad Complex.

title: Vista Mode
body: Worked on the Frutiger Aero/Windows Vista mode a bit more. Added a fake BIOS screen and redid the fake Vista loading screen. I think I got it where I want it to be now. Had my dad over for a Father's Day dinner too. I cooked some chicken and corn and stuff, and we just kind of sat around and talked about life.

title: ChaseRoleplay
body: Lyn-z dragged me into a wacky economy FiveM server. Had a bit of fun, but it's really not my thing. She sounds cute as hell though, and I genuinely enjoyed her and the other players' company during my short stay in ChaseRoleplay.

title: Figure In Phoenix
body: Figured out that one of my favorite dubstep artists, Figure, is playing locally at some shithole parking lot down in Phoenix. Kind of want to go, but I'd be rolling solo. I feel like I need to get out there more.

title: Modern Games
body: Tried to play Forza Horizon 6 with Landon, and I'm just disappointed with modern day games and what they've become, basically.

title: Fake Vista Vibe
body: Changed Frutiger Aero, to be honest. I think I want to go for a fake Windows Vista vibe instead.

title: Frutiger Aero Page
body: Big into Frutiger Aero right now. Kinda want to make a little Frutiger Aero page with little fish and a song by Alyzea.

title: Still Shaved
body: A couple months later, shaving my head might honestly have been one of the best decisions of my life. I feel a lot more confident now, and the burden of needing to worry about hair is just gone. It feels like a weight off my shoulders, basically. It has made life more enjoyable, the gym more enjoyable, swimming more enjoyable, traveling more enjoyable. To sound cringy, it was honestly kind of a pivotal moment in my life.

title: Desert Breeze Furmeet
body: Met up with a distant friend, Gem, at Desert Breeze Park in Tempe. There was a pretty big furmeet and I met a lot of cool people. I'm glad I've gotten more outgoing over the years. His suit was really nice :3

title: Zoo With Family
body: Went to the zoo with family :3 It was a bit underwhelming, honestly. There were a couple of animals, but I didn't get to see the hyenas, which I really wanted to see. I did get to pet a goat though, which was the highlight of my day, because I love goats. Otherwise, yeah, very underwhelming for the price.

title: OdySea After Dark
body: Went to a work event where they booked out the OdySea Aquarium in Scottsdale, and it was a pretty good night. There was a lot of partying and just an overall fun time seeing everything, especially at night when everything was blocked off and felt kind of eerie.

title: Shaved My Head
body: Decided to shave my head. Feels weird, but relieving.

title: New Year Cruise To Globe
body: Went on our annual New Year Cruise to Globe. It was a fun time. I feel a lot of us drifting apart and the squad shrinking as life takes us on more and more back roads without a map.

title: Berge's Riverview Toyota Meet
body: Went down to a massive car meet hosted at Berge's Riverview Toyota. Such a cool turnout and quality time with friends!
